About JC Landscaping

Built on craft,
Designed with vision

Led by Ryan Jowett, JC Landscaping brings together stonemasonry precision and design-forward thinking to create outdoor spaces that are as functional as they are beautiful.

We work with premium natural stone, quality plants, and considered landscaping techniques — delivering results across residential and prestige properties throughout the Central Coast, Newcastle, and Sydney.

What We Do

Landscaping & Construction Services

Every service is delivered with precision craftsmanship and close attention to your property's character.

01 Stone Paving & Pathways

Travertine, bluestone, sandstone and flagstone installed to perfection. Driveways, paths, courtyards and entertaining areas.

02 Stone Walling & Cladding

Retaining walls, feature walls and facade cladding using natural fieldstone and dressed stone for lasting visual impact.

03 Garden Design & Turfing

Full garden installations including turf laying, garden beds, terracing, planting design and corten steel edging.

How It Works

A Seamless Process,
From Concept to Completion

We take the complexity out of landscaping so you can enjoy the result.

1

Free Consultation

We visit your property, listen to your vision, and assess the site — no obligation, no pressure.

2

Design & Quote

You receive a detailed proposal with clear pricing, materials selection, and project timeline.

3

Expert Build

Our team executes every element with precision — keeping you informed at every stage.

4

Final Handover

We walk you through the finished project and ensure every detail meets your expectations.
